semantic.role: Infrastructure utility for constructing localized markdown-only prompt strings from semantic JSON input.
responsibilities: Assembles a prompt string using the PromptBuilder facade for documentation generation.
Integrates localized language instructions and markdown section guidance from shared utilities.
Formats the semantic JSON and supporting context as prompt context blocks.
Ensures output adheres to specified language markers for markdown blocks.
invariants: Must import PromptBuilder facade for prompt construction
Must not contain business logic or domain-specific processing
Must output a string formatted with markdown block markers

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a reusable, localized prompt-building utility for documentation generation within the infrastructure layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; the git intent references modularizing CLI and decoupling core infra services, but this file shows no evidence of such changes.
